textByHash.1704245c885ca34f6330e096daeabaa622da447e: When I became King of the Tree Gnome Village, I thought I was lucky, for I did so during a time of peace. However, it seemed that peace was not to last.
textByHash.4a8201120398666cd00c8b90cd80881e4e6eee81: Human activity in the area was increasing, and conflict between our two races seemed inevitable.
textByHash.c68dc8345e1d6bb542be4d52929e278d7d57d018: Fearing the worst, I had my trusted advisor reach out to King Healthorg of the Gnome Stronghold, but his response left much to be desired...
textByHash.66cf3ff287e42afaef42b06177e629c7f42a4c9c: And so the reign of the most famous gnome king came to an end.
textByHash.e096ccf8b759beb26db4a981004f531ff466b26f: With Healthorg gone, voting on his replacement would soon begin. Many expected his son, Argenthorg, to be the only serious contender.
textByHash.490ee5f1b274da2aa2cd04614e53daa332581d88: But my advisor and I had other ideas...
textByHash.34d61df5806b01fc8b09241c420c48edeace7d09: Despite our best attempts, Argenthorg looked certain to win the election.
textByHash.a7e7d4ad13f4fee371a75d6dff922a7815b268d4: Healthorg was a great king far longer than he was a weak one. Everyone assumed his son would be as great as he was.
textByHash.1177891ddc140c269b134a9b5784b70ae5bd9797: We needed to show them the truth. We needed to show them that Argenthorg was weak. My advisor said he knew how...
textByHash.4996275412330fe9a62129f9bbfd77c2152a2762: There ended my campaign to become the new king of the Gnome Stronghold. Argenthorg was crowned soon after and Glouphrie disappeared once more.
textByHash.04de00aa8a2b882f20042315e81faeef86994701: I don't know what the gnomes of the Tree Gnome Village will think once they hear what I've done, but it does not matter. They deserve a better ruler than I.
textByHash.85ba2d6a57e7b9f80f6282b032b4c0725a1789b0: And so I am preparing to leave the lands of my people, but before I go, I will ensure foul illusions cannot be allowed to shame us gnomes again.
textByHash.ef5d5c8fdc9f4a3dd7dfabbc2044c3a90658d51f: As for the one who chooses to practise such dark arts... He will be punished. I will make it my life's purpose...
